results.title: Stock Market Today (May 1, 2026): Nasdaq, S&P 500 jump again after record closes - TheStreet
Stock Market Today (LIVE): Apple Jumps 3% on Earnings Beat and Pushes S&P 500 Above 7,200 to Start May
May Starts Merrily on Apple Earnings, Peace Hopes
CNBC Daily Open: May Day dawns
Stock Market Today: Dow, S&P Live Updates for May 1 - Bloomberg
Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq rise after record highs as earnings roll in

results.summary: S&P 500 up 0.6% to fresh ATH. Nasdaq up 1.1% to new ATH. Dow flat. Apple earnings beat drove rally. Iran peace proposal reduced risk premium. Atlassian +23% on earnings. Roblox -24% on guidance cut. April was best monthly performance since 2020 for S&P 500 and Nasdaq.
